case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & VS. NATHANAEL HOLLIE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLIE, NATHANAEL $1,812.99 PRINCIPAL, $902.27 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,715.26

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLIE, NATHANAEL $1,747.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,812.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLIE, NATHANAEL NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLIE, NATHANAEL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,747.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLIE, NATHANAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $902.27 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLIE, NATHANAEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$65.99) SERVED JUL-05-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLIE, NATHANAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR SERVED AUG-14-2025, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLIE, NATHANAEL PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON OCT-20-2025 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
